items.question: What does the Pro plan include?
items.draft_answer: The Pro plan includes additional billing automation and invoice handling, but the exact feature list was not grounded with enough certainty.

citations.title: Plans and Billing
citations.snippet: After upload, the document enters a review step before it becomes part of the billing record.

items.question: How can customers upload invoices?
items.draft_answer: Customers can upload invoices from the billing area, but the answer needs review before it is presented as final.

citations.title: Plans and Billing
citations.snippet: Open the billing area, select Invoices, and use the upload action to attach a PDF or image file.
